chirality_ladder.mechanism: Step Ħ through ordinal values: 𐑓(H0) → 𐑒(H1) → 𐑖(H2) → 𐑫(H_inf). Each step adds one Markov order of memory.

scope_focusing.note: Scope modulation requires formulation changes — not achievable via dose alone for most compounds.

adjoint_steering.mechanism: R=𐑽 (adjoint coupling) enables one-way directed experience. Set intention vector before dosing; experience follows direction without return.
adjoint_steering.protocol: 1. Meditate on target domain for 10 min. 2. Dose Apertix. 3. Maintain directed attention for first 30 min (adjoint vector locks). 4. Experience unfolds along vector.

protocol_the_dive.description: DMT + Praxeum background for full 16-universe access with Gate 1 modulation available.
sequence: 1. Apply Praxeum patch 30 min before (low dose, 1-2 mg/h — Gate 1 OPEN)
4. Optionally increase Praxeum dose to close Gate 1 and explore EP-modulated space

protocol_precision_map.description: Retiarius to map local neighborhood → Apertix to steer to target region.
sequence: 1. Administer Retiarius — map the local structural neighborhood (30 min)
2. Identify target universe/dimension from the Retiarius map
3. Administer Apertix with directed intention toward target
4. Adjoint steering carries experience to the precise structural region
